sales.description:
JUDAEA. Roman Administration. Titus as Caesar, 69-79 C.E. AE 21mm, Caesarea Maritima Mint. NGC VF. Repatinated.

Meshorer-382; Hendin-6474; RPC-II, 2312. Judaea Capta issue. Obverse: Laureate head right; Reverse: Nike-Victory standing right, with foot set upon helmet on ground, inscribing shield supported upon knee; palm tree to right. Deep green in hue and somewhat off-center on each side.
